title: Main Shadi Karne Chala
actors: Mumtaz Askari, Feroz Khan, Prem Chopra
plot: The film is set in the beautiful Kashmir. Deepak(I S Johar) has a Photo Studio on a Houseboat in Jhelum river, along with his friend Raja(Rajendranath). Deepak loves Seema (Sayeeda Khan) a daughter of Janakidas (Badri Prasad) and Jan
